nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Dyaphorophyia
nodes.summary: Dyaphorophyia（Dyaphorophyia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Chestnut wattle-eye、West African wattle-eye、White-spotted wattle-eye。

nodes.name: Chestnut wattle-eye
nodes.summary: Chestnut wattle-eye（Dyaphorophyia castanea）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Chestnut wattle-eye。

nodes.name: Chestnut wattle-eye
nodes.summary: The chestnut wattle-eye (Dyaphorophyia castanea) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is widespread across Central Africa. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical swamps, and moist savanna. It is often found on cocoa farms. Gallery References External links Image at ADW Archived 2008-12-02 at the Wayback Machine
nodes.shortSummary: The chestnut wattle-eye (Dyaphorophyia castanea) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is widespread across Central Africa.
